title: China Will Open Its Market to AI Chips From US, Nvidia’s CEO Says
description: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang, speaking days after he joined President Donald Trump’s summit in China, said he expects Chinese authorities to eventually allow the import of artificial intelligence chips from the US.

title: Elon Musk Loses Case Against Sam Altman Over OpenAI’s Overhaul
description: A jury rejected Elon Musk’s claims that OpenAI under Sam Altman’s leadership betrayed its mission to benefit the public by morphing into a for-profit business, finding that he waited too long to sue the company.

title: AI Chip Startup Tenstorrent Draws Takeover Interest From Intel, Qualcomm
description: Artificial intelligence chip startup Tenstorrent Inc. is drawing early takeover interest from prospective buyers at a moment of renewed momentum for upstarts looking to challenge Nvidia Corp. and Advanced Micro Devices Inc.
